name: test_cohort_upload_with_empty_file
description:
Test: Upload an empty cohort file and verify error handling.
Steps:
1. Navigate to cohort import page.
2. Upload an empty file.
Verification:
- Import fails and error is shown.
descriptionHtml:

  2. Upload an empty file.
